gazette: OJ L 325, 7.10.2020, Official Journal of the European Union
title: The EU will apply anti-dumping duties on hot-rolled steel products (HS code 7219) consigned from Turkey
bodyHtml:
The definitive anti-dumping duty imposed by Implementing Regulation (EU) 2020/1408, on imports of flat-rolled products of stainless steel, whether or not in coils (including products cut-to-length and narrow strip), not further worked than hot-rolled and excluding products, not in coils, of a width of 600 mm or more and of a thickness exceeding 10 mm, originating in Indonesia, the People’s Republic of China and Taiwan, is extended to imports of flat-rolled products of stainless steel, whether or not in coils (including products cut-to-length and narrow strip), not further worked than hot-rolled and excluding products, not in coils, of a width of 600 mm or more and of a thickness exceeding 10 mm, currently classified under HS codes 7219 11, 7219 12, 7219 13, 7219 14, 7219 22, 7219 23, 7219 24, 7220 11 and 7220 12, consigned from Türkiye, whether declared as originating in Türkiye or not (TARIC codes 7219110010, 7219121010, 7219129010, 7219131010, 7219139010, 7219141010, 7219149010, 7219221010, 7219229010, 7219230010, 7219240010, 7220110010, and 7220120010).

The extended duty is the anti-dumping duty of 17,3 percent.

Please click for the related Regulation.
